info.title: Infisical API
info.description: Infisical is an open-source secret management platform. This API provides programmatic access to secrets, projects, environments, identities, organizations, secret imports, dynamic secrets, certificate authorities, integrations, and more. Secrets are versioned per-resource (v3, v4).
